title: collinsia sparsiflora var. solitaria
intro: Collinsia sparsiflora var. solitaria, also known as Solitary Blue Lips, is a rare, alpine plant species belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Collinsia sparsiflora var. solitaria include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce swelling, and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
